detaileddescription.para: Ramp output from 0 toward target over ramp_ms. Returns current output.
Check all safety conditions. Returns true if safe.

parameterdescription.para: Motor controller to tune (tuner takes control while active).

simplesect.para: SYN_OK, or SYN_ERROR if position_limit is 0.

briefdescription.para: Update the auto-tuner — call from main loop.

simplesect.para: Current state. When DONE, results are in syn_autotune_result().

briefdescription.para: Apply computed gains to the motor controller.

detaileddescription.para: Copies ff_kv, ff_scale, and PID gains into the motor controller. Only valid when state == DONE.

briefdescription.para: Abort the auto-tune and stop the motor immediately.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_AutoTune *at, SYN_MotorCtrl *ctrl, const SYN_AutoTune_Limits *limits, SYN_AutoTune_Flags flags, uint16_t gain_multiplier)
memberdef.name: syn_autotune_start

briefdescription.para: Start a fully automatic tune sequence.

detaileddescription.para: Runs probe → FF identification → braking → relay PID tune → braking as a single self-sequencing state machine. The user only provides physical constraints.

parameterdescription.para: Safety margin for PID gains (percentage, e.g., 80).

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, or error code.
